description: REST endpoint that receives arbitrary event payloads via HTTP POST and forwards them — together with the inbound HTTP headers — to a Kafka topic 'events.raw' as the single source of truth for downstream consumers. The published Kafka payload is JSON with EXACT field names: id (str), received_at (str ISO 8601), headers (dict[str, str]), payload (str, raw HTTP body decoded UTF-8).
acceptance_criteria: Given a POST to /events with body 'hello' and header 'X-Source: cli', When ingest_event is called, Then result is an IngestedEvent
Given an empty body, When ingest_event is called, Then an error is raised
Given a body larger than 1 MB, When ingest_event is called, Then an error is raised
Given an IngestedEvent, When publish_event is called, Then the event is sent to topic 'events.raw' with JSON payload containing keys id, received_at, headers, payload
Given Kafka is unreachable, When publish_event is called, Then an error is raised
